lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਥਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aithai mileh vaddaaeea darageh paaveh thaau |3|
lines.english: In this world you shall be blessed with greatness, and in the Court of the Lord you shall find your place of rest. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: kare karaae aap prabh sabh kichh tis hee haath |
lines.english: God Himself acts, and causes others to act; everything is in His Hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਜੀਵਾਲਦਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: maar aape jeevaaladaa antar baahar saath |
lines.english: He Himself bestows life and death; He is with us, within and beyond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਸਰਬ ਘਟਾ ਕੇ ਨਾਥ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੮੫॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee sarab ghattaa ke naath |4|15|85|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of God, the Master of all hearts. ||4||15||85||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਐ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਰਬ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: satagur kai upadesiai binase sarab janjaal |
lines.english: Through the Teachings of the True Guru, all worldly entanglements are eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਹੋਆ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: saran pe prabh aapane gur hoaa kirapaal |
lines.english: The Guru is Merciful; we seek the Sanctuary of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਲਗਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: andar lagaa raam naam amrit nadar nihaal |1|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is firmly implanted within my mind; through His Ambrosial Glance of Grace, I am exalted and enraptured. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere satigur sevaa saar |
lines.english: O my mind, serve the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਦਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kare deaa prabh aapanee ik nimakh na manahu visaar | rahaau |
lines.english: God Himself grants His Grace; do not forget Him, even for an instant. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਨਿਤ ਗਾਵੀਅਹਿ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਕਟਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gun govind nit gaaveeeh avagun kattanahaar |
lines.english: Continually sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, the Destroyer of demerits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਕਰਿ ਡਿਠੇ ਬਿਸਥਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bin har naam na sukh hoe kar dditthe bisathaar |
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, there is no peace. Having tried all sorts of ostentatious displays, I have come to see this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਉਤਰੇ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sahaje sifatee ratiaa bhavajal utare paar |2|
lines.english: Intuitively imbued with His Praises, one is saved, crossing over the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਵਰਤ ਲਖ ਸੰਜਮਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: teerath varat lakh sanjamaa paaeeai saadhoo dhoor |
lines.english: The merits of pilgrimages, fasts and hundreds of thousands of techniques of austere self-discipline are found in the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੂਕਿ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕਿਸ ਤੇ ਜਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: look kamaavai kis te jaa vekhai sadaa hadoor |
lines.english: From whom are you trying to hide your actions? God sees all;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਧਾਰੀਅਨੁ ਸਚਿ ਸਿਰਜਿਓਨੁ ਜਹਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachee kudarat dhaareean sach sirajion jahaan |
lines.english: True is the Creative Power which He has created. True is the world which He has fashioned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੀ ਅਮਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਾ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach paatisaahee amar sach sache sachaa thaan |
lines.english: True is His Empire, and True is His Command. True is His Seat of True Authority.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahiaa prabh meraa bharapoor |3|
lines.english: He is Ever-present. My God is totally pervading all places and interspaces. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਉ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੁ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੮੬॥
lines.translit: naanak japeeai sach naam hau sadaa sadaa kurabaan |4|16|86|
lines.english: O Nanak, chant the True Name; I am forever and ever a sacrifice to Him. ||4||16||86||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਦਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਣਾ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਧਨੁ ਖਾਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: audam kar har jaapanaa vaddabhaagee dhan khaatt |
lines.english: Make the effort, and chant the Lord's Name. O very fortunate ones, earn this wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਣਾ ਮਲੁ ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਕਾਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: santasang har simaranaa mal janam janam kee kaatt |1|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, meditate in remembrance on the Lord, and wash off the filth of countless incarnations. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਜਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: man mere raam naam jap jaap |
lines.english: O my mind, chant and meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛੇ ਫਲ ਭੁੰਚਿ ਤੂ ਸਭੁ ਚੂਕੈ ਸੋਗੁ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man ichhe fal bhunch too sabh chookai sog santaap | rahaau |
lines.english: Enjoy the fruits of your mind's desires; all suffering and sorrow shall depart. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਤਨੁ ਧਾਰਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਡਿਠਾ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaaran tan dhaariaa so prabh dditthaa naal |
lines.english: For His sake, you assumed this body; see God always with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jal thal maheeal pooriaa prabh aapanee nadar nihaal |2|
lines.english: God is pervading the water, the land and the sky; He sees all with His Glance of Grace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਭਜੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਕੀਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: charan bhaje paarabraham ke sabh jap tap tin hee keet |3|
lines.english: One who dwells upon the Feet of the Supreme Lord God has truly performed all meditations and austerities. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਲਾਗੀ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal hoeaa laagee saach pareet |
lines.english: The mind and body become spotlessly pure, enshrining love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਮਾਣਿਕਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ratan javehar maanikaa amrit har kaa naau |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Name of the Lord is a Gem, a Jewel, a Pearl.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸਾਸਤੁ ਸਉਣੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਤੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: soee saasat saun soe jit japeeai har naau |
lines.english: That is the essence of the scriptures, and that is a good omen, by which one comes to chant the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਰਸ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੪॥੧੭॥੮੭॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand ras jan naanak har gun gaau |4|17|87|
lines.english: The essence of intuitive peace and bliss is obtained, O servant Nanak, by singing the Glories of God. ||4||17||87||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲ ਗੁਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal gur dhan deea miliaa nithaave thaau |
lines.english: The Guru has given me the Wealth of the Lotus Feet of the Lord, and I, without shelter, have now obtained Shelter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saachee poonjee sach sanjamo aatth pehar gun gaau |
lines.english: The True Capital, and the True Way of Life, comes by chanting His Glories, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh bhettiaa maran na aavan jaau |1|
lines.english: Granting His Grace, God meets us, and we no longer die, or come or go in reincarnation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਸਦਾ ਇਕ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har bhaj sadaa ik rang |
lines.english: O my mind, vibrate and meditate forever on the Lord, with single-minded love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਦਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar rav rahiaa sadaa sahaaee sang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is contained deep within each and every heart. He is always with you, as your Helper and Support. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸਿਆ ਉਹ ਰਸੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin chaakhiaa se tripataasiaa uh ras jaanai jind |
lines.english: Those who taste it are satisfied and fulfilled; their souls know this Sublime Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਾ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਿਆ ਗਣੀ ਜਾ ਸਿਮਰੀ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: sukhaa kee mit kiaa ganee jaa simaree govind |
lines.english: How can I measure the happiness of meditating on the Lord of the Universe?
